notes: This PR series is for Scaffold-GS sandbox work only.
Do not promote these changes to production defaults without formal docs and benchmark review.
The default mode prepares PR drafts only. Branch creation is opt-in.

pull_requests.title: Scaffold-GS bridge-first checklist, schema, and probe runner
pull_requests.commit_subject: feat(scaffold): add bridge-first checklist and probe runner
summary: Add Scaffold bridge probe runner for export and Unity import verification.

pull_requests.title: Scaffold-GS density split and ladder diagnostics
pull_requests.commit_subject: feat(scaffold): add density split and ladder diagnostics
summary: Add split probe runner to isolate density vs appearance.
Add density ladder runner for controlled coverage tests.
Patch sandbox stdout flush and port handling to stabilize Windows runs.

pull_requests.title: Scaffold-GS shortlist and bridge-gated PB design
pull_requests.commit_subject: docs(scaffold): add shortlist and bridge-gated PB design
summary: Mark bridge-blocked knobs vs post-bridge candidates.
Add bridge-gated PB design instead of launching a large screen immediately.
verify_commands: Inspect scaffold_shortlist.csv and scaffold_pb_design.json for bridge-gated knob policy.
